blocks.text: Remove the clip. While pulling out the tailgate upper garnish (A), cut the double-sided adhesive tape (B) using a cutter knife. Remove the double-sided adhesive tape remaining on the body and clean with white gasoline or alcohol.
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.

items: The double-sided adhesive tape section shall be securely pressed to prevent floating, etc.

items.text: When reusing the tailgate upper garnish (A), remove the double-sided adhesive tape remaining on the garnish and clean with white gasoline or alcohol.
When reusing the tailgate upper garnish (A), remove the double-sided adhesive tape remaining on the garnish and clean with white gasoline or alcohol.
Apply primer to the adhesive surface of the garnish and apply new double-sided tape (B) to the position shown.
Apply primer to the adhesive surface of the garnish and apply new double-sided tape (B) to the position shown.
